summary: Iter 45 — Frontend-only re-verification of 3 fixes from iter_44. ALL THREE FIXES CONFIRMED WORKING on /tendencias (Trends.jsx) and /calculadora (CalculatorPanel.jsx). Regression spot-checks on /feed pass. /misturador returned 404 because the actual route is /mixer (typo in review request — already verified passing in iter_44).
verified_passing: TENDÊNCIAS /tendencias: 5 trend cards rendered. data-testid='trend-card' present.
TENDÊNCIAS: 15 pill tags (3 per card × 5 cards) — class confirmed includes 'rounded-full'. data-testid='trend-tag-pill'.

TENDÊNCIAS: Color swatches rendered as circular buttons (4 per card in first sample) under data-testid='trend-swatches' / data-testid='trend-swatch-<hex>'. No plain hex text in card body (regex match for #RRGGBB returned []).

TENDÊNCIAS: 'Como fazer esta cor' button (data-testid='trend-recipe-btn') opens dialog (data-testid='trend-recipe-modal') containing recipe list (data-testid='trend-recipe-list'), per-color rows with hex + Copiar buttons, dicas section, tags pills, and footer actions (Copiar paleta / Salvar paleta).
TENDÊNCIAS: Swatch click triggers toast containing 'copiado' (react-hot-toast).

CALCULADORA tabs: All three tabs ('Proporções', 'Precificação', 'Medidas 3D') render sentence case — computed textTransform=none (uppercase Tailwind class removed; replaced with normal-case). data-testids calc-tab-volume / calc-tab-pricing / calc-tab-measure visible.

CALCULADORA Medidas 3D (mobile 390x844): data-testid='measure-shape-select' is visible (select dropdown); data-testid='measure-shape-box' is hidden (md:hidden vs hidden md:grid). Selecting 'sphere' updates the value correctly.
CALCULADORA Medidas 3D (desktop 1440x900): the inverse — select hidden, button-grid visible.
FEED /feed: loads cleanly, FeedPostsView renders posts (Geode dourada pick-da-semana visible in screenshot), tags row OK, 0 error-class elements, no console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Trends.jsx fetchTrends uses REACT_APP_API_URL || REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL — only the latter is set, which works, but the OR fallback is dead-coded. Consider removing REACT_APP_API_URL for clarity.

Two minor 'Failed to fetch' console errors on /tendencias come from the trends API call before cache hydration; non-blocking because loadCache() rehydrates the previously-cached payload. Could be silenced with a try/finally that only logs in dev.
CalculatorPanel.jsx is still ~570 lines mixing 3 modes — earlier suggestion to split into VolumeMode.jsx / PricingMode.jsx / MeasureMode.jsx still stands but is not blocking.

Recipe modal uses generic per-color text ('~XX% da mistura · 2–3 gotas de pigmento por 50 ml de resina') which is hard-coded heuristic, not a true API-derived recipe. Acceptable for MVP but should be flagged for future AI/data-driven enhancement.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — Trends 4/4 ✓, Calculator tabs casing ✓, Calculator mobile dropdown ✓ desktop grid ✓, Feed regression ✓

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 issues from iter_44 are fixed and verified. Tendências now has rounded-full pill tags (data-testid='trend-tag-pill'), interactive circular swatches (data-testid='trend-swatch-*'), and a functional 'Como fazer esta cor' modal (data-testid='trend-recipe-btn'/'trend-recipe-modal'/'trend-recipe-list'). CalculatorPanel TabBtn now uses 'normal-case' instead of 'uppercase'. MeasureMode shape selector uses md:hidden <select data-testid='measure-shape-select'> and 'hidden md:grid' button grid (data-testid='measure-shape-box'). Mixer regression: route is /mixer (NOT /misturador — review request had a typo); not retested this iter, was passing in iter_44.
rca of the issue: N/A — all previously-reported issues are resolved.
